goal: Restore the card corpus from the regressed 65-card local state back to the last validated 169-card collection baseline (170 raw showcase records with 1 intentional duplicate-name pair in collection dedupe).
constraints: Do not alter unrelated story, menu, or community recovery work.
Prefer restoring the exact last validated card-source file rather than re-authoring card content by hand.
Keep the existing cardsSource/catalogAdapter chain intact unless a card-count regression requires a minimal fix.
If the 169-card collection baseline depends on a known duplicate-name pair, preserve that behavior and record it clearly.
deliverables: Restore src/data/showcaseCards.ts to the last trusted 170-record card source that yields a 169-card collection view.
Document the recovery basis in a short audit note.
Update durable project memory only if a stable baseline lesson was confirmed.
Clean up any incidental temporary files created while auditing the card corpus.
